entities.name: PEST MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Strategies and tactics used to control pest populations

entities.name: INSECT SPECIES
entities.description: Various insect types that act as agricultural pests

entities.name: INSECTICIDE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of insect pests to survive exposure to insecticides

entities.name: PEST RESURGENCE
entities.description: The return of pest populations to high levels following control efforts

entities.name: PESTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical substances used to kill or control pests

entities.name: CULTURAL CONTROL
entities.description: Agricultural practices used to manage pests

entities.name: MECHANICAL CONTROL
entities.description: Physical methods used to manage pests

entities.name: SYNTHETIC INSECTICIDES
entities.description: Man-made chemical agents used to kill insects

entities.name: MICROBIALS
entities.description: Microorganisms used as biological control agents

entities.name: NATURAL PLANT PRODUCTS
entities.description: Plant-derived substances used for pest management

entities.name: SELECTIVE INSECTICIDES
entities.description: Insecticides designed to target specific pest species

entities.name: GENETICALLY MODIFIED CROPS
entities.description: Crops engineered to possess specific traits like insect resistance

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: Complex networks of biological interactions

entities.name: ECOLOGICAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: Interactions between organisms and their environment

entities.name: ECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: Biological communities of interacting organisms and their physical environment

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The use of biological systems or living organisms to develop products

entities.name: BIOPESTICIDES
entities.description: Pesticides derived from natural materials

entities.name: NATURAL ENEMIES
entities.description: Organisms that prey on or parasitize pests

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent or engineered ability of a plant to resist insect attack

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: The direct manipulation of an organism's genes

entities.name: GENE PYRAMIDING
entities.description: The combination of multiple resistance genes into a single plant

entities.name: CROP PROTECTION
entities.description: The practice of managing pests and diseases to protect crops

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT CONSERVATION
entities.description: The practice of protecting and preserving the natural environment
